SEARCH
Module game.weekend.simplelibrary
Package game.weekend.simplelibrary

Class Proper

java.lang.Object
game.weekend.simplelibrary.Proper
public class Proper extends Object
Locally stored application properties.

  • Method Details

    • read

      public static void read(String name)
      Read previously saved application properties.
      Parameters:
      name - name of the application properties file without specifying the type.

    • save

      public static void save()
      Save application properties.

    • setProperty

      public static void setProperty(String name, int value)
      Save the property with an integer value.
      Parameters:
      name - property name.
      value - integer value.

    • getProperty

      public static int getProperty(String name, int def)
      Get the integer name property.
      Parameters:
      name - property name.
      def - default property value.
      Returns:
      integer value of the property.

    • setProperty

      public static void setProperty(String name, String value)
      Save the property with the string value.
      Parameters:
      name - имя свойства.
      value - строковое значение.

    • getProperty

      public static String getProperty(String name, String def)
      Получить строковое свойство name.
      Parameters:
      name - property name.
      def - default property value.
      Returns:
      string value of the property.

    • saveBounds

      public static void saveBounds(Component c)
      Save component location.
      Parameters:
      c - component.

    • setBounds

      public static void setBounds(Component c, int dx, int dy, int dw, int dh)
      Place the component in a previously saved position. If the component has not been saved before, it will be located at the coordinates specified in the parameters.
      Parameters:
      c - component.
      dx - х by default.
      dy - y by default.
      dw - default component width.
      dh - default component height.

    • saveBounds

      public static void saveBounds(JFrame frame)
      Save the location of the main application frame.
      Parameters:
      frame - frame.

    • setBounds

      public static void setBounds(JFrame frame)
      Place the main application window in a previously saved or default location.
      Parameters:
      frame - frame.
